case_title: SAFEWAY INC. VS. SHAKA DUMETZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-03-2017 CONTINUED TO JUN-14-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-14-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

OTHER NON EXEMPT COMPLAINTS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAFEWAY INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DUMETZ, SHAKA JOHN DOES 1-50 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-03-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-10-2017
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100017512)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-25-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
